zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas De Semarc III於大約1378年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾恩豪時，他的父親Nicholas De Semarc II35歲，母親Mrs Nicholas de Semarc19歲。他於1400年與Elizabeth Tame在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾恩豪結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1421年在他的家鄉享年44歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾恩豪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas De Semarc III于大约1378年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾恩豪时，他的父亲Nicholas De Semarc II35岁，母亲Mrs Nicholas de Semarc19岁。他于1400年与Elizabeth Tame在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾恩豪结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1421年在他的家乡享年44岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾恩豪。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Semarc
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Germanized form of French Saint Marc, the name of a Huguenot family that migrated to the Palatinate.
English: variant of   Seymour  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Seymour
meanings: English (London): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), and possibly also from Saint-Maur-des-Bois (Manche) and Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine), named from the dedication of their churches to Saint Maur (see   Moore   3). The family of this name who have held the title Duke of Somerset since 1547 are said by some to have originated in Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), while others claim they are from Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine). They rose to prominence under the Tudors, when Edward Seymour (died 1552) held a high position of office under Henry VIII, who was married to Edward's sister, Jane. The Norman name has been established in Ireland since at least the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas De Semarc III was born about 1378, in Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Nicholas De Semarc II, was 35 and his mother, Mrs Nicholas de Semarc, was 19. He married Elizabeth Tame in 1400, in Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in 1421, in his hometown, at the age of 44, and was buried in Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas De Semarc III est né environ 1378, à Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas De Semarc II, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mrs Nicholas de Semarc, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Tame en 1400, à Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1421, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas De Semarc III um 1378 in Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas De Semarc II 35 und seine Mutter Mrs Nicholas de Semarc 19. Er hat 1400 in Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Tame geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1421 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas De Semarc III è nato il circa 1378 nel Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Nicholas De Semarc II, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Nicholas de Semarc, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Tame nel 1400, nel Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1421, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas De Semarc IIIが約1378年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアソルンハウで生まれた時，父Nicholas De Semarc IIは35歳，母Mrs Nicholas de Semarcは19歳であった。1400年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアソルンハウでElizabeth Tameと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1421年に故郷で44歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアソルンハウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas De Semarc III(이)가 대략 1378년 영국 노르섬프토실르 토른하우그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas De Semarc II(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Nicholas de Semarc(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 토른하우그h에서 Elizabeth Tame(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1421년 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 토른하우그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas De Semarc III nasceu aproximadamente 1378, em Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas De Semarc II, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Nicholas de Semarc, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Tame em 1400, em Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1421, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas De Semarc III родился около 1378 г. в местности таурно, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas De Semarc II было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Nicholas de Semarc, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Tame в 1400 г. в местности таурно, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1421 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности таурно, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas De Semarc III nació aproximadamente 1378, en Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas De Semarc II, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mrs Nicholas de Semarc, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Tame en 1400, en Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1421, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Thornhaugh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
